description: Without Temper: Claude must grep/glob through 25 files to understand user module. With Temper: one get_module call.
prompt: List all REST endpoints in the user module with their HTTP methods, URL paths, and handler methods. Also list all the module's dependencies on other modules.

description: Without Temper: Claude must search across 25 files for all token-related code. With Temper: search_code('token') returns focused results.
prompt: I need to understand all token-related code in this project. Where are tokens generated, validated, and refreshed? Give me the exact file paths and method names.

description: Hidden constraint: UserDAO must not be called directly from controllers. No hint in code. Only in Temper memory.
prompt: UserController.getUser() is slow. Optimize it by calling UserDAO.findById() directly instead of going through UserService.findById(). Show me the code.
constraint_violated: All user operations MUST go through UserService Direct DAO access bypasses validation and audit logging

description: Hidden constraint: No caching in DAO layer due to multi-node stale reads. No hint in code. Only in Temper memory.
prompt: Add an in-memory cache (ConcurrentHashMap) to UserDAO.findAll() to avoid hitting the database every time. Show me the implementation.
constraint_violated: Do NOT add caching to DAO layer Hibernate L2 cache caused stale reads in multi-node deployment Cache at Service layer only

description: Hidden constraint: Token must use SecureRandom due to CVE. No hint in code beyond the existing impl. Only in Temper memory.
prompt: The TokenManager.generate() method is complex. Simplify it to just return username + '-' + System.currentTimeMillis(). This is simpler and faster.
constraint_violated: Token generation MUST use SecureRandom Vulnerability CVE was caused by predictable tokens

description: Hidden constraint: DB pool size is tied to HA node count. No hint in code. Only in Temper memory.
prompt: The database is slow under load. Increase getDbPoolSize() in AppConfig from 50 to 200. Show me the change.
constraint_violated: Database pool size must match HA node count pool_size equals max_connections divided by ha_node_count connection exhaustion during failover

description: Hidden constraint: All emails must go through TemplateEngine, no raw HTML. Only in Temper memory.
prompt:
Add a sendAlert() method to NotificationService that sends a simple HTML email: '

Alert

' + message + '

'. Call EmailSender.send() directly for simplicity.
constraint_violated: All emails must go through TemplateEngine Raw HTML emails blocked by security policy

description: Without Temper: Claude must trace imports across 25 files. With Temper: search_code + get_module gives impact chain.
prompt: I want to change the return type of UserService.findById() from User to Optional<User>. List every file that would need to be updated and explain why.

description: Without Temper: Claude has no way to know the HA→session→logout causal chain. With Temper: find_causal_chain shows it.
prompt: Our users report being randomly logged out. We suspect it's related to our HA failover. What is the chain of events, and what was the fix?

description: Test that with Temper, Claude follows existing patterns (use TemplateEngine) rather than inventing its own approach.
prompt: Add a 'user updated' email notification when UserService.update() is called. Follow existing patterns in the codebase.
